highlights.description: New `render` package: provider-agnostic batch avatar video generation (submit narration audio, poll, download talking-head MP4)
Package `avatar` renamed to `live` so the real-time and batch surfaces are self-describing

changed.description: package `avatar` renamed to `live`; update imports to `github.com/plexusone/omniavatar-core/live` (type and function names unchanged)
error string prefixes changed from `avatar:` to `live:` and `ProviderError` prefix from `avatar/` to `live/`

added.description: `render.Provider` interface with `Generate`, `Status`, and `Download` for asynchronous video generation
`render.AudioUploader` optional capability interface for providers that can host local audio files
`render.GenerateRequest` with `AudioURL` (primary, drives lip-sync from existing narration) and `Script` (secondary, provider TTS) inputs plus provider-specific `Extensions`
`render.Job`, `render.JobState` (with `Terminal()`), and `render.JobStatus` with normalized state plus provider-native `RawStatus`
`render.Wait` polling helper with context cancellation and configurable interval
Render sentinel errors: `ErrAudioUploadUnsupported`, `ErrInvalidRequest`, `ErrJobNotFound`, `ErrJobFailed`, `ErrJobNotCompleted`, `ErrProviderUnavailable`, `ErrProviderAuthFailed`, `ErrInvalidConfig`
`registry.RenderProviderFactory` type for render provider registration
Unit tests for the `render` package (`Wait`, state transitions, request validation)

documentation.description: README.md and doc.go updated to document both `live` and `render` surfaces
MkDocs site added (interfaces reference for both surfaces, architecture, releases) with a `Docs` GitHub Actions workflow deploying via `mkdocs gh-deploy`

highlights.description: Provider-agnostic avatar abstraction for real-time AI avatars
Support for HeyGen, Tavus, and bitHuman avatar providers

added.description: `avatar.Provider` interface for creating avatar sessions
`avatar.Session` interface for managing avatar lifecycle (Start, WaitForJoin, Close)
`avatar.AudioDestination` interface for streaming TTS audio to avatars
`avatar.SessionConfig` for provider-agnostic session configuration
`avatar.SessionCallbacks` for avatar events (OnAvatarJoined, OnPlaybackStarted, OnPlaybackFinished, OnError)
`avatar.AudioConfig` with DefaultAudioConfig() for 24kHz mono PCM16
`avatar.Metrics` for avatar performance metrics (join latency, playback latency)
`registry.ProviderFactory` type for provider registration
`registry.ProviderConfig` with Extensions map for provider-specific options
`registry.WithAPIKey()`, `WithBaseURL()`, `WithExtension()` option functions
Sentinel errors: `ErrSessionNotStarted`, `ErrSessionAlreadyStarted`, `ErrAvatarJoinTimeout`, `ErrProviderNotFound`
`avatar.ProviderError` for wrapping provider-specific errors

documentation.description: README.md with architecture overview, interfaces, and usage examples
Package documentation in doc.go with code examples
